channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Israel seizes medieval castle as it expands major offensive in southern Lebanon
item.description: Israel has captured the 12th-century Beaufort castle that overlooks southern Lebanon and northern Israel. The move suggests Israel is planning an extended military presence in Lebanon.
item.content:encoded: Israel has captured the 12th-century Beaufort castle that overlooks southern Lebanon and northern Israel. The move suggests Israel is planning an extended military presence in Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre

item.title: Experimental pill promises new hope for deadly pancreatic cancer
item.description: A novel pill helped people with advanced pancreatic cancer live longer, researchers reported Sunday, raising hopes of long-needed better treatments for one of the deadliest types of cancer.
item.content:encoded:
A novel pill helped people with advanced pancreatic cancer live longer, researchers reported Sunday, raising hopes of long-needed better treatments for one of the deadliest types of cancer.

(Image credit: Min Yu/AP)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The biggest permanent desert lake threatens with rising waters and hungry crocs
item.description: Kenya's Lake Turkana is the world's largest permanent desert lake. Its waters have long sustained hundreds of thousands. Now the lake is facing multiple threats — and threatening those who rely on it.
item.content:encoded:
Kenya's Lake Turkana is the world's largest permanent desert lake. Its waters have long sustained hundreds of thousands. Now the lake is facing multiple threats — and threatening those who rely on it.

(Image credit: Tommy Trenchard for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Text and photos by Tommy Trenchard

item.title: Democrats and Republicans think control of Congress runs through Iowa
item.description: Iowa is no stranger to political attention in presidential elections, but surprisingly competitive midterm contests highlight the state's importance for both parties as it holds its primary Tuesday.
item.content:encoded:
Iowa is no stranger to political attention in presidential elections, but surprisingly competitive midterm contests highlight the state's importance for both parties as it holds its primary Tuesday.

(Image credit: Stephen Fowler | NPR)
item.dc:creator: Stephen Fowler

item.title: These AI models are free, private, and will never say 'no'
item.description: Open-weight AI models with advanced capabilities and no safeguards are becoming much more accessible. While they can be useful, AI safety experts have concerns.
item.content:encoded:
Open-weight AI models with advanced capabilities and no safeguards are becoming much more accessible. While they can be useful, AI safety experts have concerns.

(Image credit: Patrick Lux)
item.dc:creator: Huo Jingnan

item.title: Reality TV can be unserious and dramatic. It's also training political candidates
item.description: Reality shows are an escape with characters who can be larger than life. But some stars use the experience of fame as a stepping stone toward another challenge: running for political office.
item.content:encoded:
Reality shows are an escape with characters who can be larger than life. But some stars use the experience of fame as a stepping stone toward another challenge: running for political office.

(Image credit: Luke Gulbranson for Congress)
item.dc:creator: Saige Miller

item.title: San Antonio Spurs win the West, beating Oklahoma City Thunder to head to NBA Finals
item.description: The San Antonio Spurs celebrated after beating the odds and defeating the defending champions Oklahoma City Thunder, to advance to the NBA Finals
item.content:encoded:
The San Antonio Spurs celebrated after beating the odds and defeating the defending champions Oklahoma City Thunder, to advance to the NBA Finals

(Image credit: Nate Billings)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Immigrant detainees sue over 'horrific' conditions at Texas ICE facility
item.description: Immigrant detainees accuse the federal government of 'inhumane' abuse and treatment at Camp East Montana in El Paso, Texas.
item.content:encoded:
Immigrant detainees accuse the federal government of 'inhumane' abuse and treatment at Camp East Montana in El Paso, Texas.

(Image credit: Morgan Lee)
item.dc:creator: Kristin Wright

item.title: Judge agrees to review Trump's $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund
item.description: The fund has sparked a broad backlash since it was announced earlier this month, exposing fractures within the Republican Party.
item.content:encoded:
The fund has sparked a broad backlash since it was announced earlier this month, exposing fractures within the Republican Party.

(Image credit: China Pool)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.
item.content:encoded:
Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.

(Image credit: Denes Erdos)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
